---
title: "FeatureMetric"
generated: true
description: "Projection of feature differences into a metric subspace."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.smoothing.metric`](../nitrix-smoothing-metric.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:FeatureMetric -->
```python
class FeatureMetric(Protocol)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:FeatureMetric -->
Projection of feature differences into a metric subspace.

The only operation the bilateral kernel requires of a metric:
given feature differences `deltas` of shape $(\dots, d_f)$,
return `project` of shape $(\dots, k)$ such that
`sum(project(deltas)**2, axis=-1)` equals the quadratic form
$\text{deltas}^{\top} M\,\text{deltas}$ for the metric
$M$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:FeatureMetric.project -->
```python
project(deltas: Float[Array, '... d_f']) -> Float[Array, '... k']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Project feature differences into the metric subspace.


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:FeatureMetric -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `d_f` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
